summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of marketing website updates including hero CTAs, navigation changes, WhatsApp button removal, Calendly button addition, and new Partners page with filtering functionality
passed_tests: CRO page hero CTA says 'Start with a CRO audit'
Paid Advertising page hero CTA says 'Start with a paid advertising audit'
Analytics page hero CTA says 'Start with an analytics audit'
All three service pages have reassurance items: Free audit included, No long-term contracts, Results within 90 days
Nav CTA button says 'Request a Revenue Teardown'
WhatsApp button successfully removed from footer
Calendly floating button appears with purple color (#7B2FBE) and calendar icon
Partners page loads with 'Partners & Tools' hero section
Partners filter bar shows all 5 categories: All, Analytics, Experimentation & CRO, Paid Media, CRM & Automation, AI Tools
Filter functionality works correctly - all filters show appropriate number of cards
27 total partner cards across 5 categories with proper structure
Partner cards have category pills, names, descriptions, and Visit Website links
Partners appears in navbar between Our Model and Contact
Partners appears in footer Company column
Partners page CTA section has 'Request a Revenue Teardown' button
